items.title: Sheikh Hamad: The Arab leader who broke Israel’s siege on Gaza
items.summary: A look at Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani's enduring legacy of solidarity and support for the Palestinian people.

items.title: YSRCP using disgruntled farmers as pawns to stall Amaravati, alleges Ananda Babu
items.summary: The opposition party is trying to stall development of the capital city project by using a small number of disgruntled farmers as pawns in its political game, alleges Nakka Anan...

items.title: Fire in Bangkok Bar Leaves at Least 27 Dead
items.summary: The fast-moving blaze sent people fleeing toward the bathrooms to hide, officials said. Their bodies were found there, raising questions about safety standards.
